title: Wings of the Beast gives flight

card.rawText: Take flight for 1 turn cycle. The equipped creature cannot be damaged by any creature without wings.

plan.title: Wings of the Beast gives flight
plan.summary: Equip Wings of the Beast and verify the equipped creature gains Flight/Flying status.

notes: Equip Wings of the Beast to player_1 primary creature.
This fixture covers the Take flight status, not the separate non-winged damage prevention clause.

steps: Player 1 equips Wings of the Beast to their primary creature.
Inspect the equipped creature's Flight status.

expectedAssertions.label: Wings of the Beast remains equipped/on field

manualVerification: Confirm Flight expires after one full turn cycle.
Confirm 101-E02 separately prevents damage from creatures without wings while Flight is active.
riskNotes: This status fixture intentionally does not assert damage immunity from non-winged creatures.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Wings of the Beast flight status.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
